name: eBay
description: Search listings, manage inventory, and handle orders via the eBay REST APIs.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Interact with the eBay REST APIs to search items, manage inventory, retrieve orders, and handle fulfillment.

tools.name: search_items
tools.description: Search for eBay items using keyword and filter queries.

category_ids.desc: Comma-separated list of category IDs to filter results.

filter.desc: Refine results using filters (e.g. price:[10..50], conditions:{NEW}).

limit.desc: Number of items to return per page (max 200).

offset.desc: Number of items to skip for pagination.

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific eBay item.

fieldgroups.desc: Comma-separated list of field groups to include: PRODUCT, COMPACT.

tools.name: get_item_by_legacy_id
tools.description: Retrieve a single item using its legacy eBay item ID.

legacy_item_id.desc: The legacy eBay item ID (numeric string).

legacy_variation_id.desc: The legacy variation ID for a specific variation of the item.

tools.name: get_orders
tools.description: Retrieve a list of orders for the authenticated seller.

limit.desc: Number of orders to return per page (max 200).

offset.desc: Number of orders to skip for pagination.

orderIds.desc: Comma-separated list of specific order IDs to retrieve.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Retrieve a single order by its order ID.

orderId.desc: The unique identifier of the order.

tools.name: create_shipping_fulfillment
tools.description: Create a shipping fulfillment for an order to mark it as shipped.

orderId.desc: The unique identifier of the order to fulfill.

lineItems.desc: Array of line items being shipped, each with lineItemId and quantity.

shippedDate.desc: Date and time of shipment in ISO 8601 format.

shippingCarrierCode.desc: Shipping carrier code (e.g. USPS, UPS, FEDEX).

tools.name: get_inventory_item
tools.description: Retrieve an inventory item by its seller-defined SKU.

sku.desc: The seller-defined SKU of the inventory item.

tools.name: list_inventory_items
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all inventory items for the authenticated seller.

limit.desc: Number of inventory items to return per page (max 200).

offset.desc: Number of inventory items to skip for pagination.

tools.name: create_or_replace_inventory_item
tools.description: Create or replace an inventory item using a seller-defined SKU.

sku.desc: The seller-defined SKU for the inventory item.

availability.desc: Availability object containing shipToLocationAvailability with quantity field.

condition.desc: Item condition: NEW, LIKE_NEW, NEW_OTHER, NEW_WITH_DEFECTS, MANUFACTURER_REFURBISHED, etc.

product.desc: Product object containing title, description, aspects, imageUrls, and mpn.
